description: overlap@10: recall_hybrid(bm25_budget_ms=30000) vs recall_hybrid(bm25_budget_ms=250) — measures that #87 BM25 timeout guard does not change top-10 result quality

corpus.source: prod_corpus real lessons (role+topic+lesson_text+embedding), no project_id FK

bench_params.query_selection: random sample from eligible lessons (len>80, no [DOC:, no [WATCHDOG])

interpretation: 250ms BM25 budget does not change top-10 results vs 30s budget on 300-lesson real corpus. Overlap@10=1.0 across all 30 queries — BM25 path completes within budget at this corpus scale. p95=4.79ms post-patch.
